final:
module d_flip_flop (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rstn,
    input wire d,
    output reg q
);
    
    always @(posedge clk or negedge rstn) begin
        if (!rstn) begin
            q <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end
    
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= ~d;
    end
  end

endmodule
